Built for Real Fans

Everything You Need

The ultimate live companion for the baseball fan who watches with their brain, not just their eyes.

⚾
Balls, Strikes & Outcomes

Call it before it happens — ball, strike, or at-bat result. Single, double, homer, out. Every prediction locked in before the pitch.

💰
Coins & Multipliers

Every correct call earns coins. String hits together to build multipliers. Zero real money — just escalating stakes on every at-bat.

🏆
Ranks & Leaderboards

See where you stack up globally and within your leagues. Your prediction accuracy tracked across every game you play.

👥
Create or Join Teams

Start your own squad with a custom code or join friends' leagues instantly. Local rivalries, family competitions — game on.

📡
Follow All 30 MLB Clubs

Follow your team — or every team. Get game alerts whenever your teams take the field, from AL East to NL West.

🚫
Zero Sportsbook. Ever.

No gambling. No cash stakes. No house edge. Pure baseball IQ — legal everywhere, free for anyone 13 and up.

Simple as 1-2-3-4

How It Works

From download to leaderboard domination in four steps.

1
Download Free

Grab GameWagerBaseball from the App Store. No subscription. No credit card. Free forever.

2
Pick a Live Game

Browse Live, Upcoming, and Past games. Tap any live MLB matchup to jump in instantly.

3
Make Your Call

Predict ball, strike, or at-bat outcome before it happens. Locked in — no going back.

4
Earn & Climb

Correct calls stack coins and build your multiplier. Watch your rank rise in real time.

Free · iOS · No Gambling
